queries.original_sql_xml:
<select id="selectOrderWithCustomer" parameterType="map" resultType="OrderVO">
    SELECT O.ORDER_ID,
           O.ORDER_DATE,
           NVL(O.TOTAL_AMT, 0) AS TOTAL_AMT,
           C.CUST_NAME,
           NVL(C.PHONE, '미등록') AS PHONE,
           DECODE(O.STATUS, '01', '주문접수', '02', '배송중', '03', '배송완료', '기타') AS STATUS_NM
    FROM TB_ORDER O, TB_CUSTOMER C
    WHERE O.CUST_ID = C.CUST_ID(+)
      AND O.ORDER_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
                           AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
    ORDER BY O.ORDER_DATE DESC
</select>

<select id="selectOrderDynamic" parameterType="map" resultType="OrderVO">
    SELECT O.ORDER_ID,
           O.ORDER_DATE,
           O.TOTAL_AMT,
           C.CUST_NAME
    FROM TB_ORDER O
    INNER JOIN TB_CUSTOMER C ON O.CUST_ID = C.CUST_ID
    <where>
        <if test="orderId != null">
            AND O.ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
        </if>
        <if test="custName != null and custName != ''">
            AND C.CUST_NAME LIKE '%' || #{custName} || '%'
        </if>
        <if test="statusList != null">
            AND O.STATUS IN
            <foreach item="status" collection="statusList" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                #{status}
            </foreach>
        </if>
        <if test="minAmt != null">
            AND O.TOTAL_AMT >= TO_NUMBER(#{minAmt})
        </if>
    </where>
    ORDER BY O.ORDER_DATE DESC
</select>

<select id="selectTopNOrders" parameterType="map" resultType="OrderVO">
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT ORDER_ID,
               ORDER_DATE,
               TOTAL_AMT,
               ROWNUM AS RNUM
        FROM TB_ORDER
        WHERE STATUS = #{status}
        ORDER BY TOTAL_AMT DESC
    )
    WHERE RNUM <= #{limit}
</select>

<update id="updateOrderWithNvl2" parameterType="OrderVO">
    UPDATE TB_ORDER
    SET STATUS = #{status},
        MEMO = NVL2(#{memo}, #{memo}, MEMO),
        TOTAL_AMT = NVL(#{totalAmt}, TOTAL_AMT),
        MOD_DATE = SYSDATE,
        MOD_USER = NVL(#{modUser}, 'SYSTEM')
    WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
</update>
